name: Leg Extension
resistance_profile: Peak tension near lockout; isolates the quads (rectus femoris best with the hip extended).
rom_notes: Full knee extension to a controlled deep flexion.
execution_steps: Adjust the seat so your knees line up with the machine's pivot, and set the ankle pad on your lower shins.
Sit tall, hold the handles, and keep your hips pressed down in the seat.
Extend your knees until your legs are straight, squeezing the quads at the top.
Lower under control to a deep bend without letting the weight crash down.
good_when: You want to isolate the quads (including the rectus femoris) with no fatigue elsewhere.
You want to add quad volume without loading the back or hips.
You want a pre-exhaust or a finisher after compound work.
bad_when: You want a compound stimulus for overall leg mass and strength.
Knee pain flares with resisted end-range extension.
common_errors: Partial range at the top only
